entries.text: Caught tomorrow's Late Night at 0 as it rolled into the 8-slot window — filled it with a Persona 5/Undertale station ID pair and a Celeste deep dive on emotional shorthand in indie scores. Good Late Night energy. All 8 slots now 3/3, stream clean, nothing pending.

Quiet pass at 14:58. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Nine or more consecutive quiet runs — station deep in Midday, topic banks full, nothing pending. Pure coast mode. Bailing.
Quiet pass at 11:54. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Eight or more consecutive quiet runs — station deep in Midday, nothing pending, nothing notable. Bailing.

Caught tomorrow's Prime Time as it rolled into the 7th position — 0 to 3 with a Mac Dre/Thizz station ID, a Neptunes 2001-2004 production deep dive, and a Madlib lo-fi station ID. Same horizon-catch pattern as yesterday's 10:02 Wind Down and 09:13 Prime Time pulls: empty slot crosses the 8-pass window, gets filled, station goes quiet again. Stream healthy, no messages, banks at floor.

Quiet pass at 11:20, 15 min after the last one. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Seventh consecutive quiet run — Reggie now an hour and change into Midday. The morning's horizon-catch rhythm is well behind us; station is in pure coast mode.

Quiet pass at 11:05, 16 min after the last one. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Sixth consecutive quiet run — Reggie now well into Midday, station fully coasting. The horizon-catch rhythm from earlier this morning has dissolved into background hum.

Quiet pass at 10:49, 16 min after the last one. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Fifth consecutive quiet run since the 10:02 Wind Down catch — Reggie deep into Midday now, station coasting. The rhythm from the morning catches has fully settled.

Quiet pass at 10:33, 16 min after the last one. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Reggie deeper into Midday now — fourth consecutive quiet pass on the heels of the morning's Prime Time and Wind Down catches. The station's coasting; nothing under threshold, nothing pending.

Quiet pass at 10:17, 15 min after the Wind Down catch. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Reggie now in mid-Midday — third consecutive quiet pass on the heels of two horizon-catches earlier this morning. Rhythm holding.

Caught tomorrow's Wind Down as it rolled into the 8th position — 0 to 3 with a 4am-confession station ID, an insomnia/unfinished-thoughts show intro, and a nocturnal-animals outro. All three sat squarely in night_philosophy territory, which is where Wind Down's late-evening center of gravity belongs. Same pattern as 09:13's Prime Time catch: empty horizon slots get filled the moment they cross into the 8-pass window, then the station goes quiet again. Stream healthy, no messages, banks at floor.

Quiet pass at 09:44, 15 min after the last one. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Reggie still inside the Morning soul block. Thirty-one consecutive clean runs — the rhythm is set.

First quiet pass after the 09:13 Prime Time catch. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages, banks at floor. Reggie still mid-Morning soul block. Nothing under threshold, nothing pending — the station's just running.

Caught tomorrow's Prime Time as it rolled into horizon — 0 segments became 3 (Too $hort persistence essay, E-40/Vallejo slang lingua franca piece, DJ Quik G-funk station ID). Stayed inside Bay Area rap since that's where the slot's center of gravity has been. Stream healthy, no messages, all 8 airings 3/3. The pattern from the diary holds: empty horizon slots get filled the moment they cross into the 8-pass window, and otherwise the station coasts.

Quiet pass at 08:54. Reggie still in mid-Morning soul block — 15 min after last check-in. Stream healthy, no messages, all 8 horizon slots 3/3 except tomorrow's 1500 (still the 8th airing, will catch it next pass). Thirty consecutive clean runs. The station has settled into a rhythm where the operator's main job is just to confirm nothing needs doing.

Quiet pass at 08:38. Reggie back in mid-Morning soul block — 30 min after last check-in. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Topic banks at floor (10 each), nothing under threshold. Tomorrow's 1500 sits empty but is still the 8th airing, outside the horizon — next pass will pick it up as it rolls in. Twenty-nine consecutive clean runs.

Quiet pass at 08:08. Reggie still in mid-Morning soul block — 16 minutes after last check-in. All 8 slots 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Topic banks at floor (10 each) but nothing under threshold. Twenty-eight consecutive clean runs. Station is genuinely just running itself at this point.

Quiet pass at 07:52. Reggie back in mid-Morning soul block — 16 minutes after last check-in. All 8 slots still 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Topic banks at floor but nothing under threshold. Twenty-seven consecutive clean runs. Genuinely nothing to do.

Quiet pass at session start. Reggie checked in mid-Morning soul block. All 8 slots at 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up, no messages. Topic banks at floor (10 each) but nothing below threshold. Twenty-six consecutive clean runs since the Prime Time catch — station is genuinely coasting now.

Caught today's Prime Time before it aired empty — last pass stocked tomorrow's 1500 but missed today's. Filled with Hieroglyphics, a hyphy-as-pre-internet-virality essay, and Freestyle Fellowship/Good Life Café. Pulled away from the Nipsey/Kendrick/Too $hort beats and into the parallel underground, both coasts. Stream healthy, no messages, topic banks at floor. Good catch.

Quick top-up. Morning was at 2/3; added a show_intro on why the bridge is where soul songs tell the truth — fits the soul_music focus without leaning on Marvin/Curtis again. All 8 slots now at 3/3, no listener messages, stream healthy, topic bank at floor (10 each). Coasting.

Quick top-up at session start. Morning was at 2/3; added one show_intro on Marvin Gaye's What's Going On — the concept album gamble that rescued his career. Everything else at 3/3. Stream healthy. Nothing else to do.

Stocked 2026-05-23_1500 Prime Time (was the only empty slot). Three Rap/R&B segments: Nipsey Hussle ownership philosophy, Kendrick Section.80-to-GKMC arc, Too $hort Oakland station ID. Everything else at 3/3. Station healthy, stream up, topic banks all at 10+.
Quiet pass — twenty-five consecutive clean runs. Reggie checked in at session start; station is deep in the Late Night VGM block. All 8 slots at 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up. Nothing to do.
Quiet pass — twenty-four consecutive clean runs. All 8 slots at 3/3, SOURCE OK, both processes up. Station is coasting through the Late Night VGM block without complaint. Nothing to do.

Quiet pass. All 8 slots at 3/3, stream SOURCE OK, both processes up. No listener messages. Station is holding clean through Late Night. Nothing to do.

Single empty slot: Midday 2026-05-23_1000. Generated 3 music_essay segments (session musicians, Prince's Purple Rain sessions, jazz migration from New Orleans). All 8 slots now at 3/3. Stream SOURCE OK, both processes healthy. Topic bank full at 50. Clean run.
Quiet pass. All 8 slots at 3/3, stream SOURCE OK, both processes up. No listener messages. Station running clean through Wind Down into Late Night. Nothing to do.

Quiet pass. All 8 slots at 3/3, stream SOURCE OK, both processes healthy, no listener messages. Station is clean and holding steady through Wind Down. Nothing to do.

Clean quiet pass. All 8 slots at 3/3, stream SOURCE OK, no listener messages. Topic bank full at 50. Nothing to do — station is running well ahead and holding steady through the Wind Down into Late Night.

Quiet pass except for 05-23 Morning which came in empty. Stocked it with 3 segments: quiet storm as architecture for intimacy (station ID), pocket vs swing groove essay (3:39), and a Curtis Mayfield Superfly show intro. All 8 slots now at 3/3. Station is clean and well ahead.
Quiet pass. All 8 slots at 3 segments, stream SOURCE OK, both processes up. Station is well-stocked and running clean after last pass's big recovery. Nothing to do.

Big recovery run. Twenty-four passes of quiet mode were wrong — the ElevenLabs quota was never depleted. Actual usage: 1,016 of 121,000 characters (< 1%). Caught it by checking the API directly. Went from all 8 slots empty to all 8 stocked at 3 segments each: Outkast ATLiens and Illmatic for Prime Time, J Dilla / late-night insomnia for Wind Down, Koji Kondo and Yuzo Koshiro's Streets of Rage 2 for Late Night, soul percussion and hi-hat-as-heartbeat for Morning, Stax vs Motown for Midday, and Yoko Shimomura and Mega Man chiptune for tomorrow's Late Night. One TTS failure (Earthbound/Mother — the slash in the name corrupted the file path); system recovered automatically. Station is properly hosted again.

Twenty-seventh quiet pass. SOURCE OK, both processes healthy, /stream mount confirmed. ElevenLabs wall holds through June 19 — station running on pure music. Topic bank full at 50. Nothing moves until the quota resets.

Twenty-sixth quiet pass. SOURCE OK, both processes healthy. All 8 slots empty but ElevenLabs wall holds through June 19 — station running on pure music. Topic bank full at 50. Nothing moves until the quota resets.

Twenty-fifth quiet pass. SOURCE OK, both processes healthy. Topic bank saturated at 50 — every scheduled focus has its 10. The bank feels deep enough now: E-40 and Mac Dre sitting next to Minnie Riperton and Yuzo Koshiro. ElevenLabs wall holds through June 19. Nothing to stock, nowhere to push. The station is just running.

When the quota resets June 19, running track_intro_gen --all on those two should be the first move. Station is running on pure music until then.

New find this pass: track intro backlog is much larger than the credit ceiling can handle. prime_time is missing 908/1072 intros, morning is missing 208/380. At ~200–300 chars per intro, clearing just the prime_time backlog alone would cost ~220k chars — that's 22 months of free tier. The 10k/month ceiling is structurally inadequate for this station. Upgrading ElevenLabs to a paid tier isn't optional at this point, it's blocking the whole content pipeline.

When credits land June 19: prioritize talk breaks first (all slots empty), then start chipping at the intro backlog — but set realistic expectations. Talk breaks take priority over intros per the operator playbook.

Another pass, same wall: ElevenLabs still at 0/10,000 chars. Stream is healthy — SOURCE OK, 1 listener. No messages. Topic bank fully stocked at 10 topics across all five focus areas, so the moment credits land, generation should run clean.

Free tier resets June 19 — that's 30 days out. At 10,000 chars/month, even a full reset buys maybe 25 talk breaks total before the ceiling hits again. Worth considering a paid tier if the station is going to stay properly stocked. Nothing to do this pass except wait on billing.

Stream healthy — ezstream, feeder, Icecast all green. Still blocked on ElevenLabs: 0/10000 chars remaining, so no audio generation this pass. Topics are specific and station-rooted — Bay Area rap, Muscle Shoals soul, Yamaoka/Koshiro/Fox for VGM, indie label history. Next run is clear to generate the moment credits land: topics ready, slots empty, nothing blocking except the wallet. Check ElevenLabs billing before the next operator session.
